title: daemon store: set_member_role accepts unchecked &str role; invalid roles persist silently
description: daemon/src/store.rs:601 set_member_role() takes role: &str and binds it directly to SQL with no validation. Any string (empty, 'superadmin', garbage) is written to space_member.role. get_space_member_role() calls SpaceRole::parse() which returns None for unknown values, making the record effectively invisible to authorization checks. Fix: change signature to role: SpaceRole and call role.as_str() before binding, matching the pattern in upsert_space_member_with_role() on line 580.
